zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Grey於1231年3月1日出生時，她的父親William de Grey of Sandiacre27歲，母親Agnes de Harestan19歲。她於1254年5月4日與Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II在英國越可爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1276年7月6日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Grey于1231年3月1日出生时，她的父亲William de Grey of Sandiacre27岁，母亲Agnes de Harestan19岁。她于1254年5月4日与Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II在英国越可爾維爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1276年7月6日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Grey was born on 1 March 1231, her father, William de Grey of Sandiacre, was 27 and her mother, Agnes de Harestan, was 19. She married Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II on 4 May 1254, in Wilton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 6 July 1276, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Grey est née le 1 mars 1231, son père, William de Grey of Sandiacre, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Harestan, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II le 4 mai 1254, à Wilton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1276, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Grey am 1. März 1231 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Grey of Sandiacre 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Harestan 19. Sie hat am 4. Mai 1254 in Wilton, Yorkshire, England Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 6. Juli 1276 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Grey è nata il il 1 marzo 1231, sua padre, William de Grey of Sandiacre, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Harestan, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II il 4 maggio 1254, nel Wilton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 6 luglio 1276, nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Greyが1231年3月1日に生まれた時，父William de Grey of Sandiacreは27歳，母Agnes de Harestanは19歳であった。1254年5月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィルトンでBaron Geoffrey de Luttrell IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1276年7月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Grey(이)가 1231년 3월 1일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Grey of Sandiacre(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Harestan(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1254년 5월 4일 영국 요르크실르 윌턴에서 Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 7월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 March 1231–6 JUL 1276: 1 de março de 1231–6 de julho de 1276
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Grey nasceu em 1 de março de 1231, seu pai, William de Grey of Sandiacre, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Harestan, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II em 4 de maio de 1254, em Wilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 6 de julho de 1276, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Grey родилась 1 марта 1231 г., её отцу по имени William de Grey of Sandiacre было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Harestan, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II 4 мая 1254 г. в местности уилтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 6 июля 1276 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.1 March 1231–6 JUL 1276: 1 de marzo de 1231–6 de julio de 1276

Se casó con Baron Geoffrey de Luttrell II el 4 de mayo de 1254, en Wilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 6 de julio de 1276, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
